summary: Selection UI widgets — options menu (SFX/music volume, stateful browsing), character select (8-char grid, D-pad, lock-in), stage select, numeric sprite rendering.
subsystems: Options: 6 states (browse, toggle, SFX vol 0-9, music vol 0-9)
Character select: 8-char grid, D-pad wrapping, sprite ID remap, 2P lock-in
Stage select: browse by name D_8004B844[i].name + "st" suffix
Number rendering: 3-digit numbers from digit sprite base 21
